free_text: A study on the effect of neutron excess on compound
and non-compound nuclear reaction cross sections at
targets were prepared by vacuum evaporation technique.
A stack of seven targets (~400-600 ug/cm2 thick) was
backed with aluminum catcher foils (~1.0-3.0 mg/cm2).
known activity, with an energy resolution of 2.5 keV
The beam current was ~5-7 nA (~1 pnA), as
measured by an electron-suppressed Faraday cup.
The overall uncertainty is estimated to be
